data.title: Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. (OTC: SGTM) Files Seven Provisional Patents Positioning Restore.Earth as the Physical Truth Layer Beneath the AI Economy
data.description: In Astatula, Fla., on April 28, 2026, Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. (OTC: SGTM) revealed the submission of seven fresh U.S. provisional patent applications — P-170 to P-176 — elevating its total co-pending portfolio to 176 applications. These submissions mark the conclusion of the intelligence and compute aspects of Restore.Earth™, the firm’s GPS-validated, AI-certified real-world platform driven by SGTM technology.

data.title: Sandvik's Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Sandvik AB convened its Annual General Meeting in Sandviken, Sweden. Stefan Widing, the President and CEO of Sandvik, addressed attendees, discussing the company's operations and financial results for the previous year, 2025. Emphasizing the key points of their performance in 2025, a year marked by notable challenges, Widing provided insights on the company's achievements and strategic direction.

data.title: Kennedy Funding Closes Land Loan in Banning, California
data.description: In Englewood, N.J., a direct lender is offering a 9% rate on a loan for a future residential development project on a 14-acre land. Steve Rogovich, the senior loan officer at Kennedy Funding, recently facilitated a land refinance deal crucial for initiating this development.

data.title: New analysis shows U.S. homeless numbers have flattened after years of sharp increases
data.description: Preliminary data for the year 2025 suggests a potential turning point in the issue of homelessness, with the number of homeless veterans reaching the lowest level ever recorded. According to a recent analysis by Community Solutions, the trend of increasing homelessness in the United States appears to be stabilizing. This development is significant as it marks a positive shift in addressing homelessness, indicating progress in combating this societal challenge.

data.title: ExchangeRight Announces Full Subscription of $41.9 Million Net-Leased All-Cash 17 DST
data.description: In Pasadena, California, a Net-Leased All-Cash 17 DST has been completely filled, joining ExchangeRight’s Essential Income REIT acquisition pipeline.

data.title: LaFleur Minerals Acquires McKenzie East Gold Project Expanding Val-d’Or Gold Portfolio; Advances Aggressive Drilling at Swanson Gold Project
data.description: LaFleur Minerals has signed a deal to purchase the McKenzie East Gold Project located in the Val-d’Or mining district of Québec, which is close to Fresnillo plc's property.

data.title: In HelloNation, Exterior Remodeling Expert Brian Jalbert Explains Home Roof Protection and the Role of Shingles
data.description: The recent article discusses the importance of maintaining shingles to prevent water damage and ensure long-term structural integrity. Released on May 18, 2026, in ALTON, N.H., the article emphasizes the significance of protecting your home from the elements. HelloNation's publication presents tips on shield your home effectively, emphasizing the role shingle maintenance plays in safeguarding against weather and extending the lifespan of your property.

data.title: The Global Islamic Finance Market is valued at $2.5 trillion in 2023 and is projected to reach $7.7 Trillion by 2033 growing at a CAGR of 12% - Allied Market Research
data.description: Islamic finance, guided by Shariah law which prohibits interest, excessive uncertainty, and unethical investments, is reshaping the way billions of people worldwide access ethical, sustainable, and inclusive financial services. This sector caters to individuals, businesses, and various other entities, offering alternatives that comply with Islamic principles and values. This new approach has gained significant traction, with a global market worth approximately $2.5 trillion, providing a growing number of individuals and institutions with access to financial services that align with their ethical beliefs.

data.title: Duke Energy Foundation invests $275,000 in nonprofits supporting Floridians' most essential needs
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on April 28, 2026, the Duke Energy Foundation announced it will provide $275,000 in grants to support 15 nonprofit organizations in Florida. These grants aim to address essential needs of Floridians by improving access to quality healthcare, affordable housing, workforce development, and other critical services.

data.title: Natura Resources Completes 1,000 Hours Operating its Molten Salt Test System to Advance Development of its Molten Salt Reactor (MSR)
data.description: In a significant development, Natura Resources LLC, based in ABILENE, Texas, revealed that their advanced liquid-fueled molten salt reactors have completed a landmark salt purification run and achieved a flowing loop milestone. The company proudly announced that they have successfully operated their technology for 1,000 hours. This achievement serves as a crucial validation for Natura's MSR technology and showcases its potential in the nuclear energy sector.

data.title: Olympus Receives FDA Clearance for POWERSEAL™ Open Extended Jaw Device
data.description: A fourth design has been added to the POWERSEAL Advanced Bipolar Surgical Energy Portfolio, providing surgeons with another choice for open surgery. This update was announced by Olympus Corporation, a leading global medical technology company, on April 28, 2026, in Westborough, Massachusetts. The company continues to expand its offerings in this area, catering to the needs of surgeons and advancing options for medical procedures.

data.title: Decisions made at Digitalist Group PLC AGM on 28/04/2026 and Board of Directors' meeting announced.
data.description: Last week, the Department of Health reported a total of 5,432 new cases of COVID-19, bringing the nationwide total to 185,723. Additionally, there were 187 new deaths, bringing the total number of fatalities to 4,291. This marks a significant increase in both cases and deaths compared to the previous week. The government has urged the public to continue following safety protocols to help curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Planview Named a Leader in Strategic Portfolio Management Solutions Evaluation
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Planview®, a prominent platform for Strategic Portfolio Management (SPM) and Digital Product Development (DPD), was recently recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Strategic Portfolio Management Tools, Q2 2026. Out of the 13 major SPM providers assessed in the report across 22 criteria, Planview stood out with a perfect score of 5/5 in 12 areas, such as “Strategic Planning,” and “Business architecture/ Capability based planning.” This demonstrates Planview’s strong position in the industry and its commitment to excellence in SPM and DPD.

data.title: Ahead of Miami Grand Prix, Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids Launches Ad Campaign Urging Formula 1 to End All Tobacco Sponsorships
data.description: New advertisements expose the utilization of Formula 1 by Philip Morris International and British American Tobacco in promoting addictive products to young audiences. Set to coincide with the Miami Grand Prix on May 3, 2026, in the U.S., these ads are part of efforts by the Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids. They shed light on how the tobacco industry giants leverage the F1 platform to entice fans, particularly the youth, contributing to the glamorization of harmful products. This development signifies the ongoing concern surrounding the influence of major corporations in shaping behaviors, with an estimated global audience of millions being potentially targeted.

data.title: G.M. sees profit rise with $500M tariff refund due to a recent Supreme Court ruling on tariff payments.
data.description: In light of a recent ruling by the Supreme Court in February, General Motors has announced that it is set to receive reimbursements for a portion of the tariffs it had previously paid. The decision marks a significant development for the company, potentially resulting in considerable financial gains.
